animation.narration: Pollution adds harmful or unwanted substances to our natural environment. These pollutants can be chemical, physical, or even biological.
animation.visual: A vibrant green forest gradually turns grey as tiny glowing 'pollutant' particles float into the air and water.

animation.narration: Factories and cars release smoke and gases into the atmosphere. This bad air causes breathing issues like asthma and bronchitis.
animation.visual: A city skyline filled with cars puffing grey clouds and factory chimneys emitting thick black smoke into the sky.

animation.narration: Industrial waste and plastic often contaminate our rivers and oceans. Polluted water harms aquatic life and is unsafe for drinking.
animation.visual: A drain pipe pouring purple liquid into a river where a sad fish swims past a floating plastic bottle.

animation.narration: Heavy use of pesticides and plastic poisons the earth's surface. Damaged soil grows less food and hurts our entire ecosystem.
animation.visual: A farmer spraying bright yellow chemicals on a brown field. The plants wilt and the soil cracks into pieces.

animation.narration: Pollution disrupts ecosystems and creates serious risks for human health. We must protect our planet to ensure a greener future.
animation.visual: A split screen showing a polluted city on the left and a clean, solar-powered park on the right.

comic.narration: Our planet faces a sneaky enemy known as environmental pollution.
comic.visual: A friendly robot guide stands on a green Earth, looking through a magnifying glass at a gray smudge.

comic.narration: It happens when harmful substances enter our natural world.
comic.visual: Bright green slime and dark smoke slowly oozing into a beautiful, sunny forest.

comic.narration: These villains, called pollutants, break nature’s delicate balance.
comic.visual: Three small, grumpy monsters labeled Chemical, Physical, and Biological jumping on a seesaw.

comic.narration: Pollution disrupts ecosystems and changes our global climate patterns.
comic.visual: A split screen showing a healthy coral reef and a dying, bleached one.

comic.narration: Factories and cars pump thick smoke into the atmosphere.
comic.visual: A busy city street with a line of cars and a factory chimney blowing dark clouds.

comic.narration: This air pollution causes breathing problems like asthma and bronchitis.
comic.visual: A person wearing a mask while walking through a hazy, gray city park.

comic.narration: Sewage and plastic trash turn our blue rivers brown.
comic.visual: A large pipe pouring purple liquid into a river filled with floating plastic bottles.

comic.narration: Dirty water hurts sea creatures and makes drinking very unsafe.
comic.visual: A sad turtle swimming near an oil spill and a pile of underwater trash.

comic.narration: Using too many pesticides poisons the ground beneath our feet.
comic.visual: A tractor spraying a glowing green mist over a field of wilted plants.

comic.narration: Toxic soil stops healthy crops from growing for humans.
comic.visual: A farmer looking sadly at a patch of dry, cracked earth with tiny, brown sprouts.

comic.narration: Growing cities make pollution a major global crisis today.
comic.visual: A world map with red 'warning' icons popping up over large, crowded industrial cities.

comic.narration: We must act now to save our home and health.
comic.visual: A group of students planting a tree and placing trash into a recycling bin.
